data.title: UK Freezes $7.7M in Crypto From Illegal Activity
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, April 11, 2025-UK authorities have frozen approximately £6 million ($7. 76 million) in cryptocurrency tied to illicit activities since 2024, as part of a broader crackdown on crypto-related crime. The enforcement initiative, which began last April, grants law enforcement and the HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC) the power to freeze suspicious wallets for up […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/uk-freezes-7-7m-in-crypto-from-illegal-activity

data.title: New Android Malware Crocodilus Targets Crypto Wallets
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, April 11, 2025-A newly discovered Android malware, Crocodilus, is raising concerns due to its ability to steal cryptocurrency wallet credentials through social engineering. The malware has been primarily observed in Spain and Turkey, but its sophisticated capabilities suggest a broader rollout may follow. Crocodilus is delivered through a dropper that bypasses Android 13 […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/new-android-malware-crocodilus-targets-crypto-wallets

data.title: Archax Enters U.S. via Broker-Dealer Purchase
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, April 11, 2025- Archax, a UK-based digital and traditional asset exchange regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA), has acquired Globacap Private Markets Inc. (Globacap PMI), a US broker-dealer and alternative trading system (ATS) regulated by the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and the Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA). This acquisition marks […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/archax-enters-u-s-via-broker-dealer-purchase

data.title: In the past hour, OM liquidation exceeded 28.61 million US dollars, mainly due to long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to data, OM’s positions were liquidated for 28.61 million US dollars in the past hour, of which long positions were liquidated for about 28.14 million US dollars and short positions were liquidated for about 470,000 US dollars.

data.title: OM Experiences Significant Liquidations in Recent Hour
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that OM faced liquidations totaling $28.61 million in the past hour. Of this amount, long positions accounted for approximately $28.14 million, while short positions saw liquidations of around $470,000.

data.title: Insurance Startup That Pays Policyholders With Bitcoin Now Valued at $190,000,000 After Series A Fundraising
data.description:
An insurance startup that pays out policyholders in Bitcoin (BTC) is now reportedly valued at nearly $200 million after a successful Series A fundraising round. According to a new report by Fortune, crypto life insurance firm Meanwhile has raised $40 million in its latest fundraising round, bringing its valuation to $190 million.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/13/insurance-startup-that-pays-policyholders-with-bitcoin-now-valued-at-190000000-after-series-a-fundraising/

data.title: OM fell by more than 70% in a short period of time and is now trading at 1.74USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The market shows that OM fell by more than 70% in a short period of time and is now reported at 1.74USDT

data.title: CryptoPunk whale pleads guilty to hiding $13M profits from IRS, faces up to 6-year sentence
data.description:
The trader faces a maximum penalty of six years in prison, though his guilty plea will likely reduce his sentence.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350662/cryptopunk-whale-pleads-guilty-to-hiding-13m-profits-from-irs-faces-up-to-6-year-sentence?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
